tasks.test: docker-compose up test-database -d && sleep 5 && docker-compose exec -T test-database pg_isready -U test_user -d test_db && DENO_ENV=test DB_HOST=localhost DB_PORT=5432 DB_NAME=test_db DB_USER=test_user DB_PASSWORD=test_password deno test --allow-all --no-check
tasks.test:watch: DENO_ENV=test DB_HOST=localhost DB_PORT=5432 DB_NAME=test_db DB_USER=test_user DB_PASSWORD=test_password deno test --watch --allow-all --no-check
